closeRoom.title: Close Room - {roomName}
closeRoom.noPermissionTooltip: You don't have admin permission to delete this room
closeRoom.tooltip: Permanently close and clear this room
closeRoom.passwordRequired: This room is password-protected. Please verify the password to continue.
closeRoom.destructiveWarning: This action will permanently and physically delete the room and all its data.
closeRoom.warningPermanent: Warning: This room contains all messages, images, documents, and configurations. Once closed, all content will be permanently and physically erased immediately.
closeRoom.warningRelease: The room name will be immediately released. Anyone can recreate and use this room name. Are you sure you want to proceed?
closeRoom.successDescription: Room {roomName} data has been completely cleared and the room name has been released.
closeRoom.failDescription: Unable to delete the room. Please try again later.
closeRoom.verifyFailed: Password verification failed. Incorrect password or unable to connect to server.

config.title: Room Configuration
config.adminOnly: Only room administrators (with delete permission) can modify room configuration
config.adminSaveOnly: Only room administrators can save configuration

permissions.title: Room Permissions
permissions.hint: Note: Edit and Share require Preview permission; Delete requires Preview and Edit permissions

save.successDescription: Room configuration has been updated successfully
save.failDescription: Unable to save room configuration. Please try again.

config.copyFailDescription: Unable to copy link. Please copy it manually.

settings.title: Room Settings
settings.adminOnly: Only room administrators (with delete permission) can modify room settings

save.successDescription: Room settings have been updated successfully
save.failDescription: Unable to save room settings. Please try again.
save.authFail: Authentication failed. Please refresh the page and log in again.

settings.jwtRefreshFail: Password has been updated, but JWT refresh failed. Please refresh the page and log in again.

passwordDialog.title: Room is Encrypted
passwordDialog.description: Room {roomName} requires a password to access

permissions.title: Room Permissions
permissions.hint: Note: Edit and Share require Preview permission; Delete requires Preview and Edit permissions
permissions.adminOnly: Only room administrators can modify permissions

save.successDescription: Room permissions have been updated successfully
save.failDescription: Unable to update room permissions. Please try again.

permissions.downgradeNotice: Permissions have been downgraded. Please re-enter your password to log in.

chat.messageUpdatedDescription: Your message has been updated successfully
chat.loadFailed: Unable to load messages. Please refresh and try again.
chat.sendFailed: Unable to send message. Please try again.
chat.updateFailed: Unable to update message. Please try again.
chat.deleteFailed: Unable to delete message. Please try again.
chat.deleteConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this message?
chat.deleteConfirmDescription: This action will be recorded until you click the save button.

messageBubble.copiedDescription: Message content has been copied to clipboard

messageInput.placeholderSendOnEnter: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
messageInput.uploadFailedDescription: File upload failed, please try again

messageList.empty: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

fileUploadZone.dragOrClick: Drag files here or click to upload

filePreview.copiedDescription: Content has been copied to clipboard
filePreview.downloadToView: Please download the file to view its content

urlUpload.title: Add Link
urlUpload.description: Add an external link to the room. The link will be saved and viewable in the file list.
urlUpload.nameOptional: (optional, will be auto-generated if left empty)
urlUpload.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of the link...

filePreviewModal.downloadFailedDescription: Unable to download file. Please try again.
filePreviewModal.linkCopiedDescription: File download link copied to clipboard
filePreviewModal.insertedToEditorDescription: Markdown link inserted at cursor position
filePreviewModal.imageLoadError: Unable to generate image URL (missing token or URL)
filePreviewModal.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support video playback
filePreviewModal.downloadToView: Please download the file to view its content

urlViewer.iframeWarning: Some websites may not allow display in iframe. If preview fails, use 'Open in new tab'
urlViewer.previewHint: Click 'Preview' button to view link content
urlViewer.newTabHint: Or click 'Open in new tab' to open in browser
urlViewer.iframeLoadError: Unable to load this link in preview. The website may not allow embedding.
urlViewer.openInNewTabHint: Please click 'Open in new tab' button to view in browser.

toast.uploadSuccessDescription: File has been uploaded to the room
toast.uploadFailed: File upload failed. Please try again.
toast.deleteSuccessDescription: File has been removed from the room
toast.deleteFailed: Unable to delete file. Please try again.
toast.linkAddedDescription: URL has been added to the room
toast.linkAddFailed: Failed to add link. Please try again.
